dataformat.name: pgp
dataformat.title: PGP (Pretty Good Privacy Cryptographic)
dataformat.description: Encrypt and decrypt messages using Java Cryptographic Extension (JCE) and PGP.
dataformat.label: dataformat,transformation,security

keyUserid.description: The user ID of the key in the PGP keyring used during encryption. Can also be only a part of a user ID.

signatureKeyUserid.description: User ID of the key in the PGP keyring used for signing (during encryption) or signature verification (during decryption).

password.description: Password used when opening the private key (not used for encryption).

signaturePassword.description: Password used when opening the private key used for signing (during encryption).

keyFileName.description: Filename of the keyring; must be accessible as a classpath resource (but you can specify a location in the file system by using the file: prefix).

signatureKeyFileName.description: Filename of the keyring to use for signing (during encryption) or for signature verification (during decryption); must be accessible as a classpath resource (but you can specify a location in the file system by using the file: prefix).

signatureKeyRing.description: Keyring used for signing/verifying as byte array. You cannot set the signatureKeyFileName and signatureKeyRing at the same time.

armored.description: This option will cause PGP to base64 encode the encrypted text, making it available for copy/paste, etc.

integrity.description: Adds an integrity check/sign into the encryption file.

provider.description: Java Cryptography Extension (JCE) provider, default is Bouncy Castle (BC). Alternatively you can use, for example, the IAIK JCE provider.

algorithm.description: Symmetric key encryption algorithm; possible values are defined in org.bouncycastle.bcpg.SymmetricKeyAlgorithmTags. Only relevant for encrypting.

compressionAlgorithm.description: Compression algorithm; possible values are defined in org.bouncycastle.bcpg.CompressionAlgorithmTags. Only relevant for encrypting.

hashAlgorithm.description: Signature hash algorithm; possible values are defined in org.bouncycastle.bcpg.HashAlgorithmTags. Only relevant for signing.

signatureVerificationOption.description: Controls the behavior for verifying the signature during unmarshaling. Possible values: optional, required, ignore, no_signature_allowed.
